input.context: End-of-article block on an article about remote work trends

articles.headline: The Office Is Back — But Nobody Told the Employees
articles.description: Feature about companies mandating return-to-office and the quiet resistance from workers. Data shows 40% of mandated workers are attending 3 or fewer days.

articles.headline: What Happens to a City When Its Commuters Disappear
articles.description: Investigation into the economic impact on city centres as commuter spending drops. Includes data from transport authorities and business rates.

articles.headline: The Loneliest Workers in the Country
articles.description: Profile piece about fully remote workers in rural areas who have not had an in-person work interaction in over a year. Mental health angle.

input.format: Teaser headline + one sentence + reading time

articles.headline: Local Park Gets New Playground
articles.description: Council installs new accessible playground equipment after a two-year campaign by parents.

articles.headline: Summer Reading Programme Returns
articles.description: Libraries launch annual children's reading programme with prizes.

articles.headline: Market to Move Indoors for Winter
articles.description: Weekly farmers' market relocating to community hall from November.

input.context: Homepage of a European affairs publication

articles.headline: Why Poland Is Now the EU's Most Important Swing State
articles.description: Analysis of Poland's shift from rule-of-law pariah to kingmaker in EU defence and migration policy.

articles.headline: The Baltic Pipeline That Changed Europe's Energy Map
articles.description: How a single gas pipeline between Norway and Poland reduced the EU's dependence on Russian energy.

articles.headline: Inside the EU's Plan to Build Its Own Satellite Internet
articles.description: Feature on the IRIS2 project to create a European alternative to Starlink for secure government and civilian communications.

articles.headline: A French Village Voted to Ban Airbnb. It Worked.
articles.description: How a commune of 2,000 residents used local planning law to ban short-term rentals, and what happened to housing prices after.

input.format: Teaser headline + two sentences + category label
